questions.question: What is the primary risk associated with storing sensitive data in a public cloud storage service, considering the least privileged access principle?
questions.hint: Explain the concept of least privileged access

questions.question: An organization is considering migrating its data to a cloud storage service. Which of the following factors should be assessed to determine the privacy impact of this migration?
What is the main difference between a cloud service provider (CSP) and a cloud broker?
questions.hint: Explain the role of each in cloud computing
